description: An updated version of the classic running shoe in a low profile design, the nike Izanami comes with a low-profile silhouette and leather upper, combining style and design. With its sleek, stylish look, the nike Izanami looks great with shorts, jeans and skirts.Upper Leather upper for durability and comfort Appliqued Nike Swoosh in a metallic finish on the sides for added style Overlay strips on side lower panels and forefoot for added structure and durability Twill tape lacing for durability and snug Fit Lightly padded tongue with brand name and logo for comfort and breathability Brand name behind the collar for added style Midsole Rubber midsole for enhanced durability and comfort Lightly cushioned footbed for comfort and protection from impact Outsole Rubber outsole in modified herrinbone pattern on forefoot for excellent traction and stability Protruding oval-shaped plain heel for easy 360° rotation on backfoot Horizontally grooved shank connecting the forefoot and heel for added traction and stability Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
